creator: shawn.wallbridge@imaginaryforces.com
text:
Thinking it might be the 10G card (Myricom 10G-PCIE2-8B2-2S, mxge), I
swapped in a Chelsio T420-CR (cxgbe) after the last crash (yesterday).

It just crashed again..

panic: handle_workitem_remove: bad file delta
cpuid =3D 7
KDB: stack backtrace:
#0 0xffffffff80947986 at kdb_backtrace+0x66
#1 0xffffffff8090d9ea at panic+0x1ce
#2 0xffffffff80b4143f at handle_workitem_remove+0x46f
#3 0xffffffff80b4069d at process_worklist_item+0x2bd
#4 0xffffffff80b450da at softdep_process_worklist+0x8a
#5 0xffffffff80b47a4d at softdep_flush+0x1ad
#6 0xffffffff808db67f at fork_exit+0x11f
#7 0xffffffff80cdc23e at fork_trampoline+0xe
Uptime: 21h41m33s

shawn
